nodes.name: 红海
nodes.summary: 红海是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括鸵鸟、大红鹳、小凤头燕鸥等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Yellow-legged gull
nodes.summary: Yellow-legged gull（Yellow-legged gull，学名 Larus michahellis），分类上属于鸻形目，并归入鸥科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括峡谷峭壁。

nodes.name: 鸥科
nodes.summary: 鸥科（Laridae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联85种鸟类，如非洲剪嘴鸥、剪嘴鸥、Little white tern等85种鸟类。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联1443种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等1443种鸟类。

nodes.name: 中东
nodes.summary: 中东是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Sand partridge、大红鹳、Yellow-legged gull等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 塞内加尔
nodes.summary: 塞内加尔是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联19种鸟类，包括White-throated francolin、Ahanta spurfowl、绿冠蕉鹃等19种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 峡谷峭壁
nodes.summary: 大型猛禽和食腐鸟偏好的高崖栖息环境。

nodes.name: 约翰·弗里德里希·瑙曼
nodes.summary: 约翰·弗里德里希·瑙曼是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Yellow-legged gull，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 北非
nodes.summary: 北非是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括白头硬尾鸭、大红鹳、翎頜鴇等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鸻形目
nodes.summary: 鸻形目（Charadriiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联310种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、短腿鸻、白鞘嘴鸥等310种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The yellow-legged gull or western yellow-legged gull (Larus michahellis) is a large gull found in Europe, the Middle East and North Africa, which has only recently achieved wide recognition as a distinct species

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The yellow-legged gull or western yellow-legged gull (Larus michahellis) is a large gull found in Europe, the Middle East and North Africa, which has only recently achieved wide recognition as a distinct species

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The yellow-legged gull or western yellow-legged gull (Larus michahellis) is a large gull found in Europe, the Middle East and North Africa, which has only recently achieved wide recognition as a distinct species

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: One to four pairs have attempted to breed in southern England since 1995 (sometimes hybrid pairs with lesser black-backed gulls), though colonisation has been very slow. Many birds remain in the same area all year round, but others migrate to spend the winter in mild areas of western Europe or head south as far as Senegal, Gambia and the Red Sea

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: One to four pairs have attempted to breed in southern England since 1995 (sometimes hybrid pairs with lesser black-backed gulls), though colonisation has been very slow. Many birds remain in the same area all year round, but others migrate to spend the winter in mild areas of western Europe or head south as far as Senegal, Gambia and the Red Sea

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It also breeds on the western side of the Black Sea; here it overlaps with the Caspian gull but there is a difference in habitat, with the yellow-legged gull preferring sea cliffs and the Caspian gull flatter shores
